'''Idis''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] who served as a member of the [[Vibroblade Brigade/Legends|Vibroblade Brigade]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], he was hired by the [[Corporate Alliance/Legends|Corporate Alliance]] to defend [[Murkhana City/Legends|Murkhana City]]. However, Idis was captured by [[Ion Team]] just prior to the [[Battle of Murkhana (Clone Wars)|Battle of Murkhana]] while relieving himself in the forest. When interrogated, Idis provided information on how to infiltrate the city and take out the [[Particle shield/Legends|particle shields]] protecting [[Murkhana Landing]]. Like many members of the brigade, he wore clothing similar to that of the [[Koorivar/Legends|Koorivar]].

{{Char-stub}}
